programme.desc: Hacker returns to the Cybrary to wreak revenge on Ms. Fileshare and the kids. His crafty plan tricks the kids to try to rescue Ms. Fileshare, only to find them all trapped. If the CyberSquad doesn't escape in time, Hacker will steal the books.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Berry Itchy Day/ Herring Eggs or Bust
programme.desc: Tooey has agreed to watch the Trading Post while Molly and her family head to their super-secret-berry-picking-spot. Molly is thrilled when her cousin Randall calls from Sitka to say he’s harvesting herring eggs—her absolute favorite food.

programme.title: Nova: Eagle Power
programme.desc: Eagles dominate the skies. With access to a new bald eagle family, witness the danger and drama of chicks struggling to survive, and what makes these predators so special.

programme.title: History Detectives: Top Secret Drone, Roosevelt's War Club & Clara Barton Letter
programme.desc: A propeller could be from a World War II drone, and an inscribed wooden club may have been a gift to Teddy Roosevelt. A letter from Clara Barton shows concern for the welfare of a soldier.

programme.title: Get the Math
programme.desc: Middle and high school students are helped to develop algebraic thinking skills for solving real-world problems.

programme.title: Get the Math 2.0
programme.desc: Real-world scenarios help students develop algebraic thinking skills with a focus on reasoning.

programme.title: Breakthrough: The Ideas That Changed the World: The Car
programme.desc: Go for a ride through the 9,000-year history of the car, from its roots in dogsleds to Henry Ford’s affordable and assembly line-built Model T, and meet the scientists working on the next generation of self-driving automobiles.

programme.title: Nova: Eagle Power
programme.desc: Eagles dominate the skies. With access to a new bald eagle family, witness the danger and drama of chicks struggling to survive, and what makes these predators so special.

programme.title: Big Pacific: Passionate
programme.desc: The quest to multiply has spawned a stunning array of unusual behaviors and adaptations. View forest penguins with a tenuous marriage and the secret rendezvous of great white sharks, and hear the tale of male pregnancy.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Howards End
programme.desc: Mrs. Wilcox's family is surprised by her final request. The Schlegels face eviction. The Schlegel sisters take up the cause of Jacky Bast's husband.

programme.title: Civilizations: What Is Art (Good For)?
programme.desc: Explore art in the age of revolution, war and profound scientific change and consider the question: Should art create a separate realm, a place of escape, or should it plunge into the chaos, transforming the way we see and live in the world.

programme.title: Latino Americans: Foreigners in Their Own Land
programme.desc: Survey the history and people from the first Spanish explorations in North America to the Mexican-American War.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Fallacy
programme.desc: An assaulted female partygoer kills her attacker, and then claims it was done in self-defence.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Chicago Crossover
programme.desc: Voight, Lindsay and Halstead track a child-pornography victim to his last-know whereabouts in New York City, where Benson and the SVU squad get a new lead. Lindsay discovers someone from her past is involved and hopes to find the ringleader.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Spousal Privilege
programme.desc: Detective Tutuola comes across leaked security footage of a violent domestic dispute in a parking garage showing a sportscaster hitting his girlfriend. Benson investigates the couple's lifestyle and history while the girlfriend pushes back.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pattern Seventeen
programme.desc: When a series of young, petite, girls are all assaulted in the early morning hours, Rollins matches the pattern to several rape cases she worked in Atlanta.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Forgiving Rollins
programme.desc: Atlanta's Deputy Chief, Charles Patton, and his newest detective, Reese Taymor, visit New York for a law enforcement conference. When Reese is found unconscious in her hotel room, she cries rape at the scene but changes her story soon afterwards.

programme.title: Modern Family: Hit and Run
programme.desc: When Jay becomes frustrated at work and Manny stresses about schoolwork, neither one seems to want Gloria's help. Phil and Claire run into Councilman Duane Bailey again, who is campaigning for his second run.

programme.title: Modern Family: Go Bullfrogs!
programme.desc: Phil takes Haley on a college tour of his old alma mater, and Claire forces Mitchell and Cameron to take her for a fun night out with the boys. Meanwhile, Gloria and Jay deal with a situation at home that may require having 'the talk' with Manny.

programme.title: Modern Family: Treehouse
programme.desc: Gloria is jealous of another couple's activity level and demands that Jay step it up for a night of salsa dancing. Cameron takes a bet too far when Mitchell and Crispin challenge him to get a woman's number at the bar.

programme.title: Modern Family: After the Fire
programme.desc: When a neighbourhood home burns down, the whole family gets together to help out.

programme.title: Modern Family: Lifetime Supply
programme.desc: When Phil misses the call from his doctor's office with his test results, he automatically jumps to conclusions and starts saying his goodbyes. Javier pops up unannounced again and takes Manny to the horse races for a belated birthday celebration.

programme.title: Modern Family: Egg Drop
programme.desc: Luke and Manny are given a school project to design a capsule that will protect an egg from a two-story drop, but when Claire and Jay catch wind of it, their own competitive drives kick in.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: I Remember Her Now
programme.desc: The body of a young girl is found crushed in an abandoned building after she runs away from a treatment centre for troubled girls. Voight sends Halstead to work undercover inside the centre, where he believes something shady is happening.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Big Friends, Big Enemies
programme.desc: When a car plows through a crowd of concert-goers and gunfire erupts, Lindsay and Ruzek are on the scene. Unsure of the motive and concerned about terrorism, they order Homeland Security to assist in the investigation.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A War Zone
programme.desc: Intelligence is tasked with tracking down the dealers of fentanyl, a drug that has been linked to multiple overdoses around the city. As they investigate possible sources, the team uncovers a series of dealers in a college smuggling ring.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Some Friend
programme.desc: After receiving a complaint, Burgess and Sorensen find the body of a young girl inside a baseball player’s home. There is conflict in the case when it is determined the player is friends with Olinsky.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: 300,000 Likes
programme.desc: Voight calls the team to investigate a homicide involving the only witness in a rape and murder case against an extremely young man. Intelligence investigates the accused's family to see if someone was paid to take out the victim.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Happenstance
programme.desc: When identical twins are found dead on the same night, the CSI team investigates whether or not the two murders are connected. However, as the team digs deeper into the histories of the women, a surprising twist takes the investigation in a new direction.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Fighting Shadows
programme.desc: When three FBI agents are killed in an explosion following a successful undercover sting operation, the tem searches for the person behind the attack. Meanwhile, Deeks and Kensi realize the team knows about their relationship.

programme.title: NCIS: Newborn King
programme.desc: When a navy captain is killed in a hotel room, NCIS must track down and protect his very pregnant companion from unknown assailants. Meanwhile, Jimmy has problems of his own when he brings his future father-in-law to work.

programme.title: NCIS: House Divided
programme.desc: Two months after Gibbs and McGee were last seen fighting an elusive group of rebels in a Paraguay jungle, the NCIS team in D.C. tirelessly searches for their missing colleagues. Also, Vance and Torres are summoned to a congressional hearing.

programme.title: NCIS: Twofer
programme.desc: NCIS is called in to investigate when the body of a missing Navy Lieutenant who disappeared a year and a half ago is located by a cemetery grounds crew. Also, Gibbs and McGee must pass a psych evaluation with Dr. Grace Confalone before resuming all work.

programme.title: NCIS: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: While on a stakeout with Metro P.D., Torres’ partner mysteriously vanishes, with the subsequent investigation leading NCIS to uncover new evidence from a decade-old murder.

programme.title: NCIS: Skeleton Crew
programme.desc: The team investigates the kidnapping of a sailor during a storm that shuts down Washington D.C. and knocks out power.

programme.title: NCIS: Fake It 'Til You Make It

programme.title: NCIS: Burden of Proof

programme.desc: The Cranes are reunited with a branch of the family when a cousin is getting married. But first, Frasier must soothe old wounds with Martin's sister-in-law, which incurred after Frasier urged his cousin to study juggling instead of medicine.

programme.title: Frasier: The Perfect Guy
programme.desc: The radio station hires a new health expert, who seems perfect in every way. Frasier tries desperately to find Dr. Clint Webber's flaw, while Martin gets thrown out of the only store that carries Eddie's favourite dog food.

programme.title: Frasier: Bad Dog
programme.desc: Much to Frasier's chagrin, Bulldog becomes a hero during an attempted armed robbery.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Gotta Have It
programme.desc: Frasier has trouble accepting that his relationship is built on physical attraction.

programme.title: Frasier: First Date
programme.desc: Niles finally takes the initiative to ask Daphne out and Frasier gets hooked on a 'soap.'

programme.title: Frasier: Roz and the Schnoz
programme.desc: Roz finally meets the parents of her baby's father and notices a family facial trait.

programme.title: Frasier: The Life of the Party

programme.desc: Lucy has an economy fit and buys a freezer, which puts a crimp on the household economy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Does a TV Commercial
programme.desc: Lucy tricks Ricky into letting her do a television commercial with hilarious results.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: If at Last You Do Succeed

programme.desc: Sophia decides to join a convent after her favourite nun, Sister Agnes, dies.

programme.title: Home and Family

programme.title: Movie: Walking the Dog
programme.desc: Rival lawyers battle each other in court as their respective dogs fall madly in love, bringing their guardians together at every turn until they reluctantly realize it may not just be the pups who are each other's true Valentine.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Fall and Order
programme.desc: A woman returns home to save her dad's annual fall festival on her family's pumpkin farm. While there, she runs into an old rival, and sparks fly.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Date Chronicles

programme.title: The Office: Money
programme.desc: As Jan renovates the condo, Michael confronts his growing debt every way he can, which includes pressuring his employees for a loan. Pam and Jim spend a night at Dwight's family farm, which was converted into a bed and breakfast.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Strength in Pain
programme.desc: An adventuress and a wilderness instructor take on the Honduras rainforest. They survive punishing storms and frigid nights, but a terrifying, close encounter with a deadly snake brings this pair to the breaking point.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Himalayan Hell
programme.desc: Two survivalists try to survive for 21 days in the high altitude and extreme cold of the Himalayan foothills in northern India. In the face of severe dehydration, one survivalist's debilitating illness threatens to derail both their chances of success.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Argentina Impossible
programme.desc: A survival instructor teams up with a pediatrician to fight storms, cold and starvation in Argentina's Yungas Cloud Forest. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before hypothermia shuts them down.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Missing in Action
programme.desc: Survivalists struggle in a variety of environments, from the Mexican island jungle to the brutal swamps of Florida. Storms and injuries hamper their efforts, but the real challenge comes when one of the survivalists goes missing.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Breaking Borneo
programme.desc: Puma Cabra and Julie Wright have to survive in Sabah, Borneo for 21 days.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Surviving Naked
programme.desc: Two survivalists attempt to survive for 21 days in the Costa Rican rainforest, despite a deadly snake bite on a producer. Fighting sickness and no food, a stay-at-home mom and a trucker unite to ward off hunger by eating a skunk.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Punishment in Panama
programme.desc: Clint Jivoin and Laura Zerra are Naked and Afraid on a Panamanian island for 21 days. Plagued by sand flies and threatened by snakes and crocodiles the pair have to stick together using all their skills and experience to survive in the tropical hell.

programme.title: Auction Kings: Dino Poo/ Ancient Head Pipe
programme.desc: The Gallery 63 crew receives a package of dino poo. Owner Paul hopes the signature on an original-issue version of Gone With The Wind proves legitimate this time. And his visit to mystical Lithia Springs yields an ancient skull-shaped jadeite pipe.

programme.title: Auction Kings: Jim Morrison Poem/ Cabbage Patch Babies
programme.desc: Gallery 63 auctions off a part-car/ part-motorcycle Lomax Trike and a forgotten handwritten poem by the Door's Jim Morrison. Paul learns 'doll' is a four-letter word when he takes in two Cabbage Patch Kids.

programme.title: Auction Kings: King, Bling, and Rodeo Ring
programme.desc: A three-carat, platinum-band ring catches manager Cindy's eye, but it's a humble bull sack purse that inspires her to hold Gallery 63's first mechanical bull rodeo. The Gallery 63 crew also takes in a vintage dive helmet and a ship's binnacle.

programme.title: Auction Kings: Moonshine Still/ Civil War Iron Knuckles
programme.desc: The Gallery 63 crew take in Civil War-era iron knuckles found on a local battlefield. Owner Paul squeezes into a particularly mini British Mini Cooper. And a family's moonshine still inspires picker Jon to try his hand at home brewing for the Gallery.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: From a treacherous island prison in Ireland to a California mining town that saw more than its share of murder and mayhem, Josh digs deep to uncover the buried secrets of six legendary locations.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Nazi Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Josh heads to Europe to expose the last secrets of the Third Reich. The lost fortune of a Nazi war criminal draws Josh to Austria, where he may need to dive deep to find treasure. He also meets a researcher who may have made a historic find.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Nazis in Argentina
programme.desc: Josh ventures to Argentina, where many Nazi SS officers escaped to after World War II.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Josh Gates Tonight: Stayin' Inside
programme.desc: Josh interviews Olympic gymnast Shawn Johnson-West and tracks stolen art looted by the Nazis with 'Monuments Men' author Robert Edsel. Then, Josh attempts the ambitious expedition of getting takeout dinner for his family.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mystery of Dead Mountain
programme.desc: Braving the sub-zero conditions of Siberia, Josh Gates investigates one of the strangest and most brutal cold cases of all-time: the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Nine Soviet hikers died suspiciously. Sixty years later, no one knows how or why.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Siberia's Coldest Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates concludes his in-depth investigation of the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Taking on Dead Mountain's brutal conditions, Josh and two investigators re-trace the last steps of the hikers. A big discovery could finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Columbus: Legend or Liar?
programme.desc: Josh travels worldwide to uncover the myths behind Christopher Columbus.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Butch Cassidy's Lost Loot
programme.desc: Josh immerses himself in Wild West lore on a quest to find Butch Cassidy's missing money. He traces the iconic outlaw's footsteps through Colorado, Utah and Nevada, eventually learning that he may need to find the man himself to locate the lost loot.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Searching For America's Lost Flight
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates why Northwest Flight 2501 vanished, taking the lives of all 58 people on board.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Viking Secrets
programme.desc: Josh investigates how a group of Norse tribesman gained power in medieval Europe. His search begins in their one-time home base of Denmark and continues on to the first place they expanded off continent, the remote island of Iceland.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Vikings in America
programme.desc: Josh traces the Vikings' westward expansion from the volcanic landscape of Iceland to a mysterious settlement in Greenland and into North America. He aims to find out if the Norse explorers landed in the United States.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Under the Knife
programme.desc: Amy undergoes gastric bypass surgery to change her life, but endangers herself by not sticking to the post-op diet. Tammy seeks support from her love interest, Jerry. Two months later, the sisters reveal the changes they've made to family and friends.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Seana's Story
programme.desc: Seana is 23 and nearly 700 lbs, living at her mom's house. She is depressed and anxious and her weight-gain threatens to take her last breath. Dr. Now can give her the tools she needs to live, but until she chooses life, no one can save Seana but Seana.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Leneatha's Story
programme.desc: For 23 years, Leneatha has worked as a pharmacy tech at a local hospital. Now, she has a young daughter to support, but she's so big that it's hard to move. If Dr. Now can't help her stop eating, losing her job could be the least of her worries.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Scared Cyst-Less

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Fixing a Family in Houston
programme.desc: Buried in debt, Habanera and the Guero in Houston, Texas, is on the verge of closing. The infighting is destroying the business, and a three-year-old daughter is stuck in the middle.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Tropical Punch
programme.desc: Well-travelled Chef Zach Meloy takes on a New Orleans transplant to Brooklyn, Chef Matt Pace, to prove their culinary chops. It's up to "Beach Bites'" Katie Lee and "Best Bakers in America's" Scott Conant to decide who has the skills to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Say Cheese!
programme.desc: Seasoned farmer and chef Duskie Estes goes up against pasta heir Francesco Buitoni to put Bobby Flay out to pasture. It's up to Giada de Laurentis and Sunny Anderson to choose the chef that will plow Bobby down.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Against The Grain
programme.desc: Chopped host Ted Allen and Food Network's Damaris Phillips try to rewrite history. Attempting to make Bobby Flay's domination a thing of the past are Southern heirloom chef Paul Fehribach and spunky pan-Asian chef Sara Nguyen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bobby Gets Sacked
programme.desc: Boston burger king Paul Malvone faces off against Twin City chef Jack Riebel on the gridiron. Former professional football player Eddie Jackson and sportscaster Jaymee Sire decide which chef gets the chance to sack Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Wisconsin State Fair and the State Fair of Texas
programme.desc: Eat your way through the Wisconsin State Fair and the State Fair of Texas.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Best Mex
programme.desc: We're searching out eight great Mexican food restaurants with ambitious dishes that go beyond the usual beans-and-rice platter. From a Peking duck taco to brisket enchiladas, we're finding the best Mexican crowd-pleasers.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Iconic Eats
programme.desc: We're counting down eight great restaurants serving up hometown heroes all over America. This is where you'll find the best version of a city's signature dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Baltimore, All the Time
programme.desc: Guy's hitting the pavement for a tasty tour of Baltimore. First, just off Dundalk Ave., a local legend cranks out all kinds of crab plates. Then, in the Hamilton neighbourhood, a farm-to-table spot cooks up bacon-wrapped meatloaf.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Standout Seafood
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's reeling in all kinds of standout seafood! There's a restaurant-market in Vancouver that's combining sustainability with killer cooking including their bouillabaisse and salmon fish and chips.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Shawarma and Scaloppini
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's travels take him to a unique little Italian restaurant in Wilmington, Del. that serves unbelievable arancini and veal scaloppini. A Middle Eastern street food spot in San Diego features some phenomenal falafel and shawarma.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Appeal
programme.desc: Guy's going on an international flavorfest.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Griddles n' Vittles
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headed west for barbecue and beyond. In Los Angeles, a food court gem grills up homemade chorizo and a Yucatan turkey special. Then, in Las Vegas, Nevada, two funky joints fire up the grill.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Surf 'n' Turf Jackpot
programme.desc: Guy hits the surf 'n' turf jackpot in Mississippi and Oahu. He tries some tasty ribs, fritters as well as pork rinds.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bagels, Biscuit and Boar
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diggin' into all kinds of flavour, starting in Santa Fe, N.M., at a pub serving comfort grub like chicken and biscuits and in-the-shell clam chowder. Also, a spot in Reno, NV, is on its game with a double elk chop and wild boar spaetzle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Sampling Of Spain
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels all the way to Barcelona, Spain, for a sampling of Spanish cooking. He digs into everything from top-notch tapas, like prawns and quail, to traditional Catalan specialties, like mouth-watering meatballs.

programme.desc: Dre's teenage cousin Kyra needs a place to stay and the Johnsons decide to take her in, but they have different approaches to helping her adjust to suburban life. Meanwhile, Jack and Diane try to vet Kyra on social media to get information on her.

programme.desc: Dre and Bow are furious after Diane isn't lit properly in her class photo. Diane doesn't want to make it a big deal, but they decide to talk to the principal about the need for sensitivity toward all complexions.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Screaming Room: Demons in Seattle Decoded

programme.title: Alone: The Kill

programme.title: Alone: Ablaze

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens in America
programme.desc: Strange rock carvings from 8,000 B. C., unexplained sightings in the new world and a frightening anomaly plaguing the American West are investigated.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Circles From the Sky
programme.desc: Crop circles have been making modern headlines since the 1960s, but their history can be traced back hundreds, if not thousands of years. The designs themselves often contain encrypted messages and complex equations.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Robots
programme.desc: In the 21st century, robots are being programmed to do everything from perform surgery on humans to explore other planets. Also, humanoid robots are rapidly reaching a level of sophistication that was thought to exist only in science fiction.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Forbidden Zones
programme.desc: Certain forbidden sites are often ground zero for chaos and the destruction of ancient artifacts and irreplaceable records detailing mankind's origins and history.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Reptilians
programme.desc: The Reptilian alien is a fixture of science-fiction, but ancient myths about reptilian creatures could provide evidence that they are more than just a pop-culture creation. Legends of serpent beings can be found on every continent.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Russia Declassified
programme.desc: Learn about a secret alliance hidden in plain sight and joint space missions with undisclosed agendas.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Next Humans
programme.desc: Transhumanists envision a future in which we become cyborgs, achieving far superior intelligence and the possibility of immortality. Ancient Astronaut theorists suggest superhuman beings have walked the Earth before.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Mountain
programme.desc: A mysterious mountain in northern Italy has stood witness to strange sightings in the sky and unexplainable phenomena for hundreds of years.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Secrets of Stonehenge
programme.desc: A shocking DNA study released in 2018 reveals that the original builders of Stonehenge mysteriously vanished. Experts discuss if Stonehenge's mysterious 'bluestone circle' could have activated a portal that transported the culture back to the stars.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Mystery of Nan Madol
programme.desc: Giorgio Tsoukalos and David Childress explore the mysterious chain of manmade islets in Micronesia's Nan Madol.

programme.title: Snapped: Blanche Taylor Moore
programme.desc: When a small town preacher is hospitalized with a mysterious illness, North Carolina police uncover a string of suspicious deaths all centered around a Burlington woman with a hidden dark side.

programme.title: Snapped: Lorraine Hunter
programme.desc: After a truck driver is found shot to death in the cab of his semi-truck, homicide detectives in California follow a trail of deceit to uncover a ruthless killer who will stop at nothing to walk free.

programme.desc: A beloved police officer's murder will take years for his brothers in blue to solve, ultimately revealing a conspiracy born out of lust and greed.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Patricia Teeter & Steven Brown
programme.desc: A shocking double murder and kidnapping springs police into action to stop a pair of deadly lovers before they can kill again. A surviving victim recounts the harrowing ordeal.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Vanished
programme.desc: Young nursing student Michelle Le had disappeared. Something drew her out to her car. As her loved ones launched a very public effort to find Michelle, investigators began their own methodical search.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Connection
programme.desc: They were bright young women out for a little fun with their friends. Kenya Monge and Lydia Tillman didn't know each other but they would be forever related, both falling prey to a smooth-talking stranger with a terrifying secret.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unimaginable
programme.desc: The case made national headlines: A toddler left in the car for seven hours while his dad was at work. Was this a heartbreaking accident? Police said it was murder. Could any parent ever do this on purpose?

programme.title: Dateline: Evil Intent
programme.desc: When a young woman fails to show up to work, her mother rushes to her home to try to find her. When she discovers begins an investigation that leads to a suspect no one imagined.

programme.title: Dateline: Final Curtain
programme.desc: A soon-to-be bride is caught in the middle of a twisted murder plot that has detectives questioning if she played a role in it. Exclusive interviews and reporting unfold the case that made national headlines.

programme.title: Dateline: The Mansion on Ocean Boulevard
programme.desc: Two tragic deaths occur within one week of each other in a wealthy city in California, leading families to wonder what happened inside a beachfront mansion.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Nightfall
programme.desc: After a young mom is found dead on the side of a country road, 40 miles from her Knoxville home, investigators scramble to figure out how she ended up there. Tucked away in her kitchen is a clue to unravelling the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Last Dance
programme.desc: A beloved kindergarten teacher and mother of two finds a new lease on life after shedding hundreds of pounds. When she suddenly vanishes from her home, investigators uncover a disturbing connection.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in a Small Town

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Deed
programme.desc: It was a sprawling southern family farm run by a former church deacon and his wife, who would want the beloved couple dead. Police followed the clues into a family feud, exposing ugly secrets but unmasking the murderer would be more complicated.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Michelle Young was married to her college sweetheart and pregnant with their second child when she was murdered. In the search for her killer, detectives uncovered a marriage riddled with secrets but cracking this complicated case took years.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deep in the Woods

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery On Blood Mountain

programme.title: How It's Made: Barber Chairs; Sewage Pumps; Bimini Boat Tops; Diesel Filters
programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: 1000th Product
programme.desc: On this episode of How It's Made, find out how Cycling Shoes, Yurts, Marine Plywood, and Encaustic Paint are made.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Blood Relative
programme.desc: After a father is found shot in front of his home, Kenda uncovers a vengeful motive behind a deadly family feud. Then, a church of God turns into a house of horrors as officers face a life-or-death decision when confronted by a knife-wielding psychopath.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Fractured Glass
programme.desc: When affable ladies' man Michael Tittemore is gunned down in the dead of night, Kenda first sets his sights on the roommates who were present during the murder. But a shocking revelation will turn his attention to a far more nefarious band of suspects.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: No Good Deed
programme.desc: After a man is brutally gunned down in the middle of the street, Kenda must piece together a puzzle of conflicting stories and dead ends. Then, a bloody body is discovered in a popular mall and Kenda must make sense of the gruesome and mysterious scene.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: High in the mountains above Colorado Springs, a woman's frozen body is found along a switchback road. Before investigators can determine who's responsible for her death, they'll need to figure out what brought her here in the first place.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Brooke Skylar Richardson
programme.desc: The parents of Brooke Skylar Richardson speak out. The real story behind the international headlines in the case of an alleged unthinkable crime.

programme.title: Predator at Large: I Will Kill Again
programme.desc: In 1988, 8-year-old April Marie Tinsley is abducted in broad daylight from her Fort Wayne street. Three days later, a jogger makes a heartbreaking discovery in nearby woods which sends cops on a 30 year-long hunt for April's sadistic killer.

programme.title: American Monster: Backyard Daddy
programme.desc: In Ogden, Utah, Stephen and Becky Vargas appear to have it all. Behind the picture perfect life seen in these rare home videos, jealousy and control issues are abound. But no one thought their marriage would end - in murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Brooke Skylar Richardson
programme.desc: The parents of Brooke Skylar Richardson speak out. The real story behind the international headlines in the case of an alleged unthinkable crime.

programme.title: Predator at Large: I Will Kill Again
programme.desc: In 1988, 8-year-old April Marie Tinsley is abducted in broad daylight from her Fort Wayne street. Three days later, a jogger makes a heartbreaking discovery in nearby woods which sends cops on a 30 year-long hunt for April's sadistic killer.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: No Good Deed
programme.desc: After a man is brutally gunned down in the middle of the street, Kenda must piece together a puzzle of conflicting stories and dead ends. Then, a bloody body is discovered in a popular mall and Kenda must make sense of the gruesome and mysterious scene.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Crossing Bad Creek Bridge
programme.desc: Two young girls are found shot to death on the side of a rural Oklahoma road. The case gets national attention, and no one is sure what would lead anyone to murder two young girls. Then, four years later, police find evidence in an unlikely place.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Beware the Green-Eyed Monster
programme.desc: Jimmy Sims, a man who owned and operated a boxing gym in the town of Galena Park, Texas, is shot in his driveway. His wife points the finger at the son of his mistress, but police must look at everyone who knew him.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Alaskan Temptress
programme.desc: A Washington community is shocked when PTA mom, Mechele Linehan is arrested for murder from a decade earlier in Alaska. Details of a seedy and sordid past emerge. But is this suburban mother a cold-blooded temptress or has she been wrongly accused?

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Long Island Serial Killer: New Revelations
programme.desc: The discovery of four women's bodies on Gilgo Beach was just the beginning. But who is the Long Island Serial Killer? Investigators uncover multiple suspects and shocking theories, as they race to capture this prolific killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder On Newberry St.
programme.desc: In 1969 race riots in York, PA, claim two lives - an African-American mother of two and a young, white police officer. Their deaths are largely forgotten until 30 years later, when their cold cases are reopened, revealing the city's dark past.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Hollywood Horror Story
programme.desc: In 2012, hikers in Los Angeles' Hollywood Hills discover the severed head of Hervey Medellin, a retired flight clerk. The cast of suspects includes former lovers, drug cartels and a murderous porn star, in a tale of lust, greed and butchery.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: In the Name of Love
programme.desc: Pvt. Tracie McBride has just arrived for military intelligence training when she's kidnapped from a laundry room at Goodfellow Air Force Base in Texas. A hunt for the missing soldier leads to a tale of horror involving a decorated war vet.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder Among Friends
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980, a popular teen goes for a run around her hometown in Maine. Days later, her savagely beaten body is found. But what happened remains a mystery for years, until her mother intervenes and forces police to re-examine the case.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Freeway Phantom
programme.desc: In 1971 and '72, Washington DC is terrorized by a cunning killer who abducts and murders six young African American girls. Police and the community are outraged by the serial killings that target young children in their own neighborhoods.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death Knows No Borders
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Donald and Umi fall in love in Indonesia. But as Umi strives to become the perfect American woman in Don's native Kentucky, he longs for something or someone more exotic and when this unorthodox family is divided only one can conquer.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Crazy Love
programme.desc: Pamela and Michael fall back in love, twenty years after the high school sweethearts break up. But the issues that first drove them apart have intensified over the years—and their second chance at love turns deadly.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Bloody Matrimony
programme.desc: Steve Dingle, a young Filipino immigrant, returns to his homeland to find a bride. It seems like a match made in heaven when he meets Cathy. But pressure builds in their marriage that will explode into infidelity, violence, and murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hell on Earth
programme.desc: Luther is a minister's son who falls hard for a pastor's daughter, Anita. With love and faith, they make it work until the work runs out. And the crushing blow of failure turns heaven-on-earth into a bloody hell.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Medieval Mercenaries
programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.

programme.desc: The team tears down a dilapidated and useless deck to make room for a $200,000 rustic retreat. Even with design changes and delayed materials, they're able to create a space with a fireplace, skylights, a fire pit, and rustic accents.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dream Deck With a Cozy Feel
programme.desc: Garth and the team face a huge challenge transforming a rickety, unsafe deck into a two-story masterpiece with a stone kitchen and bar, fire and water features and a spiral staircase.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Concrete Jungle with a Lot of Warmth
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team transforms a tiny, cramped deck into the perfect outdoor entertaining space with 1600 square feet of luxury.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Shady Space With a View
programme.desc: The biggest demo in Mega Decks history gets underway by tearing down 1500 square feet of stucco. Then steel framing and beams go up to support three different roof styles. Replacing the stucco with rails and a staircase opens up the views for the family.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Colorado Contemporary Deck
programme.desc: The crew has a $350,000 budget for a contemporary-style mega deck with a curved hand-cut stone fireplace, a pergola and a pizza oven. Building outdoors in winter subjects the crew to dangerous icy conditions and an oversight threatens the pergola build.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Masterpiece
programme.desc: A mountain home in Conifer, Colorado, gets a $375K deck with a wall-sized stone fireplace, a hot tub that seats 12 and a grill kitchen. Jason's team is pitted against Mother Nature, however, when an icy road leads to a delivery truck crash.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Log Cabin Luxe
programme.desc: To help this tiny deck achieve mega status, massive 40-foot-long Western red cedar logs are trucked in from Canada. The finished product has a three-tier pizza oven, a six-foot gas fire rail, and extra tall glass panels.

programme.title: Mega Decks: In Garth We Trust
programme.desc: A half-finished deck means a call for Garth to deliver the deck of one couples dreams. But to make their dream work, he needs to cut down a few trees, which the owners are unsure of.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: We're in Business
programme.desc: Mike and MJ decide to go into business together to buy houses and renovate them right. But MJ is in for a surprise when he discovers Mike has already purchased their first project, then finds another potential investment 3.5 hours away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Water: The Good, the Bad and the Money
programme.desc: MJ and Mike get a good deal on a St. Lawrence River eyesore in the Thousand Islands but inherit a house full of asbestos and are forced to call in a remediation team.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Demo, Digging and Dancing
programme.desc: Mike and MJ add a partial second story to the country house while dangerous structural issues in the river house force them to take down the roof and second floor walls.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: What Comes Down Must Go Up
programme.desc: Facing major structural and water issues at the river house, Mike and MJ decide to take the whole house down so they can build it back up right. This is a major setback, and their profit will take a big hit unless they identify some areas to save.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Extra Crispy
programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Big Cheese
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro, Geoffrey Zakarian, Jamika Pessoa and Bobby Flay are just a few of your favorite food personalities sharing their all-time favourite ways to indulge in some cheesy goodness.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried and Gone to Heaven
programme.desc: Some fried food is so crispy, so crunchy and so incredible that you feel like you've died and gone to heaven. Jeff Mauro heads to Proxi in Chicago for a food frenzy with the most-unique version of street corn ever imagined. Simon Majumdar takes his taste.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feast of the Middle East
programme.desc: Middle Eastern cuisine comes from more than ten countries, making it some of the most diverse and popular food on the planet.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Attack of the Mac and Cheese
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Kentucky State Fair and gets a satisfying taste of all things Southern. He starts off with the Mac Ball Burger featuring deep-fried homemade mac and cheese.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The French Toast Connection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the San Diego County fair in California, for breakfast with a bang, indulging in French toast bacon bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Million Dollar Baby Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the annual Rio Rancho Pork and Brew festival in New Mexico.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Veg Out
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shares home-cooked meals that are packed with locally grown veggies straight from the plant or prepared in a way that no vegetable has ever dreamed. Get ready to veg out with a full day of eats- without the meat!

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Superstuffed
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shares a day's worth of foods that are jam-packed, crammed full and super stuffed with the tastiest, most delicious flavors imaginable.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Terrific Italian
programme.desc: Celebrity chefs and Cooking Channel personalities are talking about the most sensational Italian food they've ever had. Alton Brown revisits a decadent, old-world pasta dish.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Rise And Dine
programme.desc: Wake up and get ready to dine on some of the country's best breakfast dishes starting with Martha Stewart's favorite biscuits and country ham found in Nashville. Scott Conant then brings a new take on French toast.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Shocking Sweets
programme.desc: New York's most shocking sweets! In Astoria, Queens, an underground donut spot called Donut Diva is frying up outrageous cake donut creations and baking coffee cake unlike anything you have ever seen.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Tasty Texas Treats
programme.desc: In the Lone Star State to find the tastiest treats in Texas! Hypnotic Donuts in Dallas is serving up deep-fried deliciousness in the form of huge fritters with decked-out flavors.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweets All Day Long
programme.desc: Check out three unique places that satisfy any sweet tooth from sunrise to sundown. At the Wandering Goose in Seattle, they push the sweet boundaries with Southern goodies like chocolate chip cookies with toffee and crispy chicken skin.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Luscious Layers
programme.desc: Three unique sweet spots that deliver layers of incredible flavors and textures. Union Fare Bakery in New York City is flipping the switch on the classic croissant and baking up flavors like red velvet and birthday cake.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Seattle Sweets
programme.desc: At Rodeo Donut, small-batch brioche doughnuts wake your taste buds up with the perfect mix of spicy and sweet. At Amandine Bakeshop, you get a taste of France.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Imagination
programme.desc: Life's too short for boring desserts, so we're sinking our teeth into some of the country's most imaginative sweets. Moojo is helping keep Austin weird and oh so delicious with customized ice cream sandwiches made with warm cookies.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Must Love Dogs Cake
programme.desc: Eloise Durrant works on an unusual request, a cake that is edible for both humans and dogs.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: An Edible Portrait on a Cake Canvas
programme.desc: Baker Molly Robbins focuses on bringing to life a large cake beach scene complete with jelly sea, crispy marshmallow rocks and dozens of hand-carved sunbathers.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Music Industry Cake
programme.desc: The standards for creativity and passion are high for baker Nastassja Lusengo, who's working on an extreme cake for a record producer.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Island Replica Cake
programme.desc: Cake duo Jamie and Joe are tackling their most challenging commission yet: a realistic model of the island of Santorini for a couple's wedding reception.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Castles, Coral And Camo Cakes
programme.desc: A cake from Down Under brings a mermaid and sea creatures to life, and a baby's gender is revealed with fairy tale castle flair. Plus, a wedding cake captures the couple's love of deer hunting.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Magical And Mysterious Cakes
programme.desc: Two edible dragons battle it out across a running stream, plus a sci-fi wedding cake transports the bride and groom to another planet.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Spinning, Lifelike Cakes
programme.desc: A flaming fire truck cake comes with its own water hose and a baker shocks the crowd when she reveals her produce stand doesn't include any actual vegetables.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Oversized, Underwater Cakes
programme.desc: Teachers are over the moon for a spaceship cake filled with cinnamon apples, and an oversized pizza cake can barely fit into the restaurant for delivery.

programme.title: NCIS: Dark Secrets

programme.title: NCIS: Family Ties

programme.desc: After the body of a missing navy commander is found, Vance orders Gibbs and the team to work with former FBI Agent Fornell. Also, Bishop and Torres interview a convicted investment advisor, when the victim is linked to his highly publicized trial.

programme.title: Movie: Abducted: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: A newborn is abducted from a New York hospital and eventually solves her own case and is reunited with her biological parents 23 years later.

programme.title: Movie: Trapped: The Alex Cooper Story
programme.desc: After coming out as gay, a young woman's parents send her to an abusive Mormon conversion camp.

programme.title: Movie: Poisoned Love: The Stacey Castor Story
programme.desc: After a couple mysterious deaths surrounding her, a woman is suspected of poisoning her family members.

programme.title: Movie: The Neighbor in the Window
programme.desc: After a woman moves to Washington to start a new life with her husband, she realizes her new neighbour is not what she seems.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course

programme.desc: Sarah visits junkyards for her family's Christmas gifts. Shelley creates a Christmas 'turkey' out of ground meat, chicken and turkey legs.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Nobody Pays Retail
programme.desc: Lydia Abate scours the obituaries, then visits surviving family members in hopes of taking the deceased person's clothing off of their hands. Mason Roberts introduces his wife to his entire family of cheapskates.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Kate
programme.desc: Dumpster diver Kate takes us through her super cheap lifestyle in New York City.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: In Sickness and in Wealth
programme.desc: Extreme Cheapskates Karen and Barry cannot stand the idea of spending money. Whether it's frying breakfast on the car engine or pulling out their own tooth at home, no task is too big and no savings too small.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Pool Rules: No Spending
programme.desc: Homemaker Jeni Cox goes to sporting goods stores, using the exercise equipment on display in lieu of a gym membership. Realtor Lisa DiMercurio spends just three dollars to stage and sell her homes.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Vacations
programme.desc: Follow a group of penny-pinching Americans who want to hit the open road without breaking open their wallets. Meet a family of four who share one bunk bed at a Dude Ranch and a mom and daughter who wear their clothes and pack food in their carry on.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Roy and Ben
programme.desc: Ben and Roy show off their frugal lifestyles. Ben throws a party on a four dollar budget and Roy shows how he freezes his assets.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: All Wrapped Up
programme.desc: Todd Moriarty is obsessed with preserving the value of his assets. In an effort to keep his home looking like new, he wraps all of his possessions - from his car to his bathroom, in plastic wrap.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Victoria
programme.desc: Victoria's boyfriend moves in on a trial basis to see if he can handle her jarring and flush free lifestyle.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The O'Briens
programme.desc: The O'Briens refuse to buy anything new, and instead find ingenious ways of fixing their broken belongings. Aimee's total net worth is $5.3 million, but she refuses to spend more than $1,000 a month.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Rick and Karissa/ Torski
programme.desc: Karissa and her husband Rick have been competing to be cheaper than the other since their wedding five years ago. By sharing everything from their shower to a single toothbrush, this cheapskate couple has no limit to their cost cutting.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Stephanie/ Larry

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bidder Loser
programme.desc: A passersby reaction to Sal burying his niece in the park, the rare outcome of a Joker vs. Joker challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The Jokers that are big pro wrestling fans, and how long it took Joe to recover from his Sumo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: What prop does Murr carry almost daily? Which Jokers danced in their high school musical?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Uncool and the Gang
programme.desc: What was Sal's fear when Joe poured water in his mouth blindfolded? What punishmnet had producers so scared, they doubled security.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Champions Special
programme.desc: Megan Neuringer gets crazy eyes, Noah Gardenswartz knows what not to say during brain surgery, and Clayton English is convinced that a major pop star is watching him.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: White Tasty
programme.desc: Tone Bell schools a lucky person on the street, Jade Catta-Preta goes hard at Tone's love life, and Noah Gardenswartz spots someone very special in the crowd.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Made Me Laugh
programme.desc: Vanessa Fraction spots a 70's sitcom star in the crowd, Rojo Perez makes an inappropriate exit, and Tone Bell reads a crowd member's mind.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Losers Special
programme.desc: Dave Hill, Tone Bell, and Julian McCullough compete to finally earn a win or at least avoid the dreaded apology.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Awww Craps
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin see if they can game the system with a high stakes dice-throwing hack, and they test some surprising hacks for sleeping through the night.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Light Up Your Life
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin explore hacks that could save money on your cable bill, and Hack Master Kosta Grammatis helps Kevin fulfill his childhood laser-blast dreams. Plus, there's an ancient Egyptian hack.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Addicted to Hacks
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke have dinner in a hot tub, and it's a blast from the past as Kevin re-hacks a self-tanner. Plus, our teens have let the hacks take over.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Co-Hackitation
programme.desc: Brooke meets a dominatrix who wants to teach a pomegranate a lesson, and Mack and Jack try to help a new couple beat the cohabitation curse. Plus, Kevin and Brooke test a hack that puts your baby to work.
