programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crazy Chicken and Twisted Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into crazy twists on chicken and burgers! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a bourbon bar that's piling pork onto a patty and doctoring up chicken skins.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Italian, Hawaiian and Colombian
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a multicultural flavour fest. In Hawaii, a poke place is knocking it out of the park with their island specialties. In San Carlos, California, a crazy Italian spot putting tasty twists on their homemade pasta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Dinner and Dessert That Delivers
programme.desc: Guy and his family combine their love of cooking at home and great restaurant food for some takeout. Four DDD alums send ingredients for their best recipes then join Guy and his son via video chat to guide them through the recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef Bonanza
programme.desc: This time around, Guy Fieri's diving into a serious beef bonanza! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a 1940s Italian family spot that's making beef braciole and meaty ravioli from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Playin' Chicken
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's playing a tasty game of chicken all over the country. In Alameda, Calif., a joint is cookin' it Nashville hot-style and putting a gourmet twist on a burger. In Lansing, Mich., the bird is served French-style at a pizza joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: That's Fresh
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's stopping by some joints that are keeping it fresh. In San Francisco, the Venezuelan joint serving up a totally gluten-free menu of authentic standbys like arepas and empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smoke And Seafood
programme.desc: Guys visits a Baltimore barbecue food truck for pulled pork and ribs, and a shrimp shack in Islamorada.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef, Lamb And Pig
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's going for all kinds of meaty favourites. In Louisville, Kentucky, a real-deal Irish pub serves up cottage pie and a lamb-cabbage specialty. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a funky spot puts out flavourful Asian-barbecue fusion.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Funky Finds in 'da House
programme.desc: Guy and his son video chat with four DD alums that walk them through one of their recipes. The recipes include a funky waffle from Syracuse, gourmet mac 'n' cheese from Cleveland and California smoked turkey and green chile pork with an island twist.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Culinary Journey
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road for on an off-the-chain culinary journey. On the Big Island, a Filipino-Hawaiian mashup making a name for leaving diners speechless.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ Bites And Southern Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing some barbecue and Southern comfort.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza Plus
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into the pie and other major mouthfuls. In Boston, a joint putting beer into their crust and then topping it with taco fixins and a steak-and-cola combo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meaty Mashup
programme.desc: In Little Rock, Ark., an old gas station-turned-eatery is pumpin' bison into a burrito and pilin' pork onto cornmeal waffles. In Santa Rosa, CA, a Vietnamese joint makes phenomenal pho and righteous barbecue pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: To Bakersfield and Beyond
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's giving some love to a little town with a lot of flavor. In Bakersfield, Calif., the landmark Basque spot serving a four-course meal including outrageous oxtail and garlic fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Funky Finds in 'da House
programme.desc: Guy and his son video chat with four DD alums that walk them through one of their recipes. The recipes include a funky waffle from Syracuse, gourmet mac 'n' cheese from Cleveland and California smoked turkey and green chile pork with an island twist.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Soakin' Up Maui
programme.desc: Guy's cruising the islands with his buddy, Chef Reno Henriques, on a culinary tour of Maui, Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches Plus
programme.desc: Guy travels to find a homemade meatloaf sandwich topped with cranberry compote.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kansas City Barbecue Tour
programme.desc: An award-winning BBQ master serves up the Kansas City special: burnt ends.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Legacies
programme.desc: Guy Fieri looks into some classic restaurant favourites in America.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bite of Britain
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's livin' it up in London, digging into a real-deal regional feast. First, a couple of British buddies smoke up true blue American 'cue. Then, a hip hangout gives classic fish-n-chips a modern makeover.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Picked 'Em
programme.desc: Revisiting favourites from past episodes such as the family restaurant in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Over the Map
programme.desc: Guys visits Phoenix for authentic Mexican tacos and Seattle for a Greek restaurant serving gyros and flaming cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Funky Joints
programme.desc: Guy chases down some funky joints doing serious cooking.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Long Time Legends

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Brrrooklyn Barbecue

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: It's Cat-urday

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer Party Helpline
programme.desc: The Kitchen Helpline is answering summer party questions and sharing recipes like Geoffrey Zakarian's grilled seafood platter and Katie Lee's peach caprese with balsamic cherries.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Day at the Races
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites some friends to celebrate Kentucky Derby season in over-the-top fashion with fanciful hats and not-so-typical hors d'oeuvres.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: New Classics
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is putting her own spin on some of her favourite dishes to make a fun meal for Nick and her dad. The menu includes Molly's Chicago dog meatloaf with mustard glaze, a salt-and-vinegar potato galette and wedge salads with bacon and feta cream.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 1
programme.desc: Ree and the kids shoot a fun show with lots of hijinks and an Italian vibe. They make orecchiette with sausage and kale for past pronto and luscious leftovers star in a crazy mashup of pepperoni fried rice.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Sweet Talk
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is celebrating the opening of her new sweet shop with a lineup of treats and sundaes. She makes incredible, old-fashioned Jeweled Divinity and shares the secrets to two of the over-the-top sundaes she serves at the parlor.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Burger Bash
programme.desc: The Kitchen is celebrating an American classic -- the burger. Sunny Anderson shares her cheese sauce-covered sizzling summer burger and Geoffrey Zakarian cooks up a cheese-stuffed lamb burger.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Grillin' with Ashley McBryde
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites fellow country singer Ashley McBryde over for a day of grilling, music and good company.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Tomatoes
programme.desc: It's all about tomatoes, one of Ina's favourite ingredients. They are starring in her Easy Provental Lamb that has 100 % wow factor and in over the top good Penne Arrabiata, the spiciest pasta in town.

programme.title: Bakeaway Camp with Martha Stewart: Bee Happy Campers
programme.desc: The five remaining campers wake up to mail call! For the Counselor's Challenge host Jesse Palmer delivers postcards from home that reveal two ingredients, one sweet and one savory, that the bakers must incorporate into one mouthwatering dessert.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: We'll Be the Judge
programme.desc: Regulars at the judges' table, chefs Ed McFarland and Dale Talde trade in their tasting spoons for chef knives as they try to beat Bobby Flay at his own game. The Kitchen's Sunny Anderson and Geoffrey Zakarian are here to cheer them on to victory.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: You Look Radishing
programme.desc: It's a battle of the South vs. Southwest as Chef Charlie Loomis of Chattanooga faces off against Chef Israel Rivera from Albuquerque, N.M., for a shot at Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Proper Smackdown
programme.desc: English chef Ian Winslade and Southern chef Geoff Rhyne must get through the challenges of the star ingredient before they can have a proper smackdown against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Use Your Noodle
programme.desc: The chips are all in when world-traveled chef Philippe Haddad meets New York's Chef Melissa O'Donnell. It's up to Scott Conant and Geoffrey Zakarian to place their bets on the chef who they think can beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Funny or Fried
programme.desc: Food Network's Alton Brown and Amanda Freitag ensure there's no funny business when Napa Valley's Gregory Wiener and comedian Daphne Brogdon compete to boo Bobby Flay out of his kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Grind it Out!
programme.desc: Los Angeles chef Michael Voltaggio and skateboarding legend Tony Hawk know they can't skate through this competition. They bring in Sichuan master Pablo Zitzmann and young gun Ming Pu to attempt to kick-flip Bobby Flay out of his arena.

programme.title: River Monsters: Jungle Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade sets out to discover the true river monster of South America.

programme.title: River Monsters: Phantom Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade explores the roots of fishing in Africa's Rift Valley and the monsters the first fishermen faced. It's a dangerous place filled with killer crocs, hippos and warring gangs, but at its heart is a worthy prize: the Nile perch.

programme.title: River Monsters: Legend of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous monster of Loch Ness and to succeed where so many have failed. The journey takes him from the depths of Loch Ness to the volcanoes of Iceland, all in pursuit of the mother of all monsters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Killer Predators of the Amazon
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is determined to find two deadly Amazonian aquatic beasts. Rumors claim that a monster fish is responsible for swallowing men whole, while another is the culprit behind the Sobral Santos last voyage, claiming the lives of hundreds.

programme.title: River Monsters: Coral Reef Killer
programme.desc: When a snorkeler is impaled and killed by an unseen underwater assailant in the waters surrounding the tropical island of Sulawesi in Indonesia, Jeremy Wade travels to the remote islands to investigate a spate of similar attacks across the region.

programme.title: River Monsters: Malaysian Lake Monster
programme.desc: After two men vanish from a remote lake in Malaysia, Jeremy Wade sets out to track down the possible culprit. A trail of evidence leads Jeremy into an ancient rainforest, where an old adversary lies in wait.

programme.title: River Monsters: Legendary Locations: Nightmares in New Guinea
programme.desc: Jeremy is off to the picturesque volcanic islands of Papua New Guinea to investigate a series of attacks by an unknown aquatic assailant that has left a trail of victims with gruesome injuries.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels the globe and risks his life to find some of the most mysterious freshwater predators. He is on a mission to test the myths that surround these creatures.

programme.title: River Monsters: The Lost Reels: Amazonian Giant
programme.desc: In 2002, Jeremy travelled to the Amazon river, in search of the world's largest freshwater fish: the Arapaima. Watch as Jeremy lands a giant for the first time. And in the most shocking scene, Jeremy is seen helpless as his plane crashes into the jungle.

programme.title: River Monsters: Pack of Teeth
programme.desc: In southern Africa there are rumours of a deadly fish that lurks unseen in the eerie waters of the Okavango.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Weapons
programme.desc: From stabbing spines and toxic barbs to lethal electric shocks and serrated clubs, Jeremy examines the vicious and varied ways that fish attack.

programme.title: River Monsters: The Deadliest Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy relives some of the most bizarre catfish tales known to mankind about the catfish.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Tiger Family Matters
programme.desc: Sumatran tiger mom Kirana is facing the loss of her sons, Topan and Jaya. They're now adults, and being moved to other zoos to start families of their own. But keepers are unsure how Kirana and her remaining cub will react to the departure of the boys.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Lady Boss Lemur
programme.desc: Chester's bachelor pad of lemurs is about to be in for a shock with a female on her way. Lemur females are dominant, so their peaceful existence may come to an end. A novice zebra starts to make a play for power, which isn't to zebra Florence's liking.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Painted Dog Puppy Drama
programme.desc: K'mana the African painted dog is pregnant with the zoo's first ever littler of this rare species, but her and the cub's father haven't always gotten along.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: First-Time Mom
programme.desc: Beautiful six-year-old okapi, K'Tusha, is nearing the end of her first pregnancy. Keepers are hoping her first baby will help to conserve this highly-endangered species from the rainforests of central Africa.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Trials of Parenting
programme.desc: Baby flamingo Marley's mom has lost interest in mothering duties leaving dad, Rum, to rear the baby alone. Parenting duties are normally shared equally by flamingo parents, but Rum will have to do the work of two parents if his son is going to endure.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Bacon and Tomato's Big Adventure
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when Jupiter, the rescued sea lion is not himself. The Ocean Voyager exhibit awaits its new residents: black-blotched Fantail stingray siblings, Bacon and Tomato, and Shelley the shy box turtle makes friends.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Maggie the Magnificent
programme.desc: Technology from California is brought to the aquarium to monitor beluga whale activity. Maggie the Asian small-clawed otter's training kicks in when receiving a shot, and Morty the sea star undergoes a checkup after suspicious growths form.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ghost Gators
programme.desc: The team is eager to open their new alligator exhibit featuring rare albino gators. Sea otter Gibson is tested for a possible infection, and divers must swim with Taroko the whale shark to get a blood sample.

programme.title: The Zoo: Birds and the Bees

programme.title: The Zoo: A Star Is Born

programme.desc: Seasoned Bigfoot hunters investigate whether a huge, ape-like beast is responsible for a string of disappearances and mutilations in the remote Alaskan wilderness. New evidence suggests woolly mammoths may have found safe haven in Alaska.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle: The Missing Douglas
programme.desc: Experts investigate whether an interdimensional portal in the Alaska Triangle led to the disappearance of an airplane carrying 44 military personnel in 1950.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals: Room 13/ Voices From the Other Side/ The Warning
programme.desc: Nurse Robbin Daidone works night shifts in a long-term care ward that scares her. She struggles to care for her patients, while ignoring unexplained noises, doors that open by themselves and the ominous feeling that she is constantly being watched.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: First Impressions, True Confessions
programme.desc: Kyle wraps shooting on her latest film and plans a welcome home party for all the ladies, including her newest friend Garcelle. Erika's singing lesson brings up a painful childhood memory. Teddi doesn't take kindly to Sutton's criticism.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: All's Fair in Glam and War
programme.desc: Lisa Rinna and Garcelle opt out of Teddi's fitness and wellness retreat, which is far from relaxing. Kyle and Erika question Dorit's all-about-me behavior. Denise is upset when her backyard dinner party takes an R-rated turn in front of her kids.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Let the Mouse Go!
programme.desc: Lisa and Teddi butt heads over Kyle's emotional meltdown. Garcelle celebrates a milestone in her sons' lives, while Lisa struggles to stay in the shadows as her daughters launch their clothing line.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Read Between the Signs
programme.desc: Erika is left seeing stars at her astrology party when old resentments flare up between Kyle, Teddi and Dorit. Denise's simmering frustration boils over in front of a speechless Lisa Rinna. After drinks, Garcelle questions a new friend's priorities.

programme.title: Movie: Sweet Home Alabama
programme.desc: A designer's plans to remarry are threatened when her first husband refuses to divorce her.

programme.title: Movie: Sweet Home Alabama
programme.desc: A designer's plans to remarry are threatened when her first husband refuses to divorce her.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: 100th Episode Special
programme.desc: Includes new, unfiltered and revealing interviews with both current and former housewives about their behind-the-scenes experiences. Featuring memorable clips from the past eight seasons that highlight both the highs and the lows of the original series.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: 100th Episode Watch What Happens Live Special
programme.desc: Take a trip down memory lane and relive the series' most unforgettable and buzz-worthy moments. Andy sits down with Housewives past and present to get the scoop on how the series has affected their lives.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: You Snooze, You Lose
programme.desc: Jenna and Adam try to move forward in their strained relationship. When Jenna joins Adam for a nap on her break, Madison and Ciara pick up the slack in service, and Glenn takes notice. Chris gets injured handling a heavy water toy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Dope!
programme.desc: Captain Glenn confronts Jenna about her relationship with Adam. A doctor visits and delivers bad news that could end one crew member’s career. Captain Glenn is shocked to learn that someone may have brought illegal drugs onto the boat.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live: Below Deck 100th Episode Celebration
programme.desc: Andy Cohen sits down with guests from Bravo's series as well as the entertainment world.

programme.title: Below Deck: Dry Land, Damp Eyes
programme.desc: Tensions within 'Ohana's' crew reach their boiling point as they prepare for the season's final charter. Dean, the recipient of Kate's infamous 'penis blanket' fury, returns as a guest. After returning to port, the crew say their final goodbyes.

programme.title: Below Deck: More Foam, Bosun!
programme.desc: Captain Lee, Kate, Eddie, and Amy are joined by five new crewmembers as they prepare the luxury yacht, Eros, for a new charter season in Abaco, Bahamas. The crew welcomes their first guests, a hard-partying hotel owner and his friends.

programme.title: Below Deck: Off the Radar
programme.desc: After Rocky and Emile are disciplined for their dangerous stunt, Kate is hell-bent on making sure Rocky atones for her mistake. Meanwhile, Connie gets some terrible news that leaves her future on the boat in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Pretty Cheeks
programme.desc: Kate's charter guest soul mate from last season returns. Rocky tries to keep going with her mundane tasks while Don tries to make amends with Eddie. Kate questions Chef Leon's credentials and Don puts his future on the yacht in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: I Don't Date, I Mate
programme.desc: In spite of being a man down with Don's departure, Eddie and the rest of the deckhands feel relieved and stronger than ever. When guest Dean suggests a crew dive contest, the Eros team willing obliges and Rocky breaks out her beloved mermaid tail.

programme.title: Below Deck: I'm Ironing the Captain's Shorts
programme.desc: After their less-than-stellar date, Rocky relegates Emile to the friend zone, and he's not having any of it. Meanwhile, Kate fails to provision a special bottle of tequila for the new guests, and it could spell disaster for her tip if she can't find it.

programme.title: Below Deck: My Dearest Emile ...
programme.desc: Connie and Rocky's whipped cream bikini party leaves a big mess on 'Eros.' Eddie’s long-distance relationship is on the rocks, and his problems are compounded when Dane and the other 'deckies' make a series of stupid mistakes.

programme.title: Below Deck: Storm's a Comin'
programme.desc: Emile is miffed when Rocky spells out the status of their relationship in a very public way. When the charter guests require an elaborate multi-course tasting menu, Leon's failure to order provisions in time puts the meal, and tips, in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Boom Boom in the Laundry Room
programme.desc: The 'Eros' crew enjoys a day off with an island hideaway, but Dane's drunken behaviour leads to a confrontation with Eddie that puts Dane's future on the boat in jeopardy. Meanwhile, the charter guests challenge Leon on his meal choices.

programme.title: Below Deck: Fire!
programme.desc: Leon commits a faux pas by ignoring a guest's meal request which brings back a traumatic childhood memory for her. When a fire breaks out in the galley, the whole boat is in danger. Plus, Connie's deckhand skills impress Eddie and Captain Lee.

programme.title: Movie: The Martian
programme.desc: After a mission on Mars goes awry, stranded astronaut Mark Watney must figure out a way to contact the team of scientists back on Earth and the crew who abandoned him using only his wit, ingenuity and limited supplies.

programme.title: Movie: Red Sparrow
programme.desc: A Russian ballerina is recruited by an intelligences organization where she's trained to use her body as a weapon but loses part of her humanity. When she's sent after her first target, a handsome CIA officer, they find themselves falling for each other.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Dress to Express

programme.title: Bunk'd: A Whole Lotta Lobsta
programme.desc: Ross and the kids are determined to make the Kikiwaka lobster festival great.

programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Bronx Tale
programme.desc: Eric Glisson was convicted of a murder he swore he didn't commit. To prove his innocence, he had to find the real killers, unearthing their long-held secrets. It would take years for the truth to be revealed, but could it set him free?

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: Cold And Calculating

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Drowning in Tears
programme.desc: When Tim meets Maryann at a Catholic mixer, it's a match made in heaven. But while the future looks bright, a dark cloud gathers on the horizon the shadow of Tim's ex-wife. Despite the best intentions, everyone knows that raising a family can be murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Rookie Mistake
programme.desc: Carli wants to be a cop instead, she marries one. And Jeff takes his role as protector a little more seriously than fun-loving Carli can handle. Her attempts to break free from the confines of wedlock sets off a chain of deadly events.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Blood and Sand
programme.desc: California beauty Pegye meets ace volleyball player Eric on the pristine sands of Newport Beach. With good looks and success they look like they've got it all but hedonism comes at a price, and living the dream quickly becomes a waking nightmare.

programme.title: A Calculated Murder
programme.desc: One year after becoming a mother for the first time, Sara Williamson Raras is found murdered. Police are quick to point the finger at her estranged husband, but an unlikely suspect emerges after a jailhouse informant reveals new information.

programme.title: American Monster: Don't Forget Me
programme.desc: On the day before he's to start a new job, a father-of-two disappears with no warning. His wife has no idea where he went. His friends hint that he led a secret, sordid life. But it remains a mystery for years - until a tip reveals the jaw-dropping truth.

programme.title: American Monster: Too Good to be True
programme.desc: When attractive teacher Amanda Schmitt marries respected John Grazioli, home video captures their beautiful wedding. But just 6 months later, police respond to a 911 call and make a shocking discovery that unmasks the double life of a cold-hearted killer.

programme.title: American Monster: Looks Can Kill
programme.desc: When mysterious and beautiful Rebecca Thudin meets the dashing Larry Fenton, a whirlwind romance is sparked. The rich, successful pair seem to be a match made in heaven, until a murder exposes a tangled web of lies, deceit and buried secrets.

programme.title: American Monster: The Green Monster
programme.desc: In rural Ohio, an intruder brutally guns down Jack and Linda Myers in their sleep. The only witness is their sleepy 4-year-old grandson. But their extensive home movies - aired here for the first time - may have captured a monster lurking in their midst.

programme.title: American Monster: Momma's Girl
programme.desc: Great-Grandfather Arthur Burney knows he's lucky to have such a large loving family. But when a dead body is discovered everyone becomes a suspect - and it'll take an unexpected tip-off to reveal the mastermind behind the murder.

programme.title: American Monster: The Craigslist Killer
programme.desc: Family and faith have always been important to Richard Beasley, as these home videos show. Which is why it's so scary when one day - the Ohio man vanishes. Especially after police discover that an online monster has been luring local men to their deaths.

programme.title: A Calculated Murder
programme.desc: One year after becoming a mother for the first time, Sara Williamson Raras is found murdered. Police are quick to point the finger at her estranged husband, but an unlikely suspect emerges after a jailhouse informant reveals new information.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Karrie's Choice
programme.desc: '48 Hours' tackles the question of whether one parent in a bitter custody battle could sway a teenager so strongly that they would help commit the murder of the other parent.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Defending DJ
programme.desc: '48 Hours' takes viewers back to October 17, 2010 when Danroy 'DJ' Henry, a university football player, was shot dead by police officer Aaron Hess. That event triggered a seven-year journey for DJ’s family as they searched for answers.

programme.title: Do Not Disturb: Hotel Horrors: Power, Privilege and Passion
programme.desc: In New York City, a rising swimwear designer finds herself a part of a toxic relationship with a local playboy. Her story turns into tragedy that concludes at the infamous Soho House.

programme.title: Do Not Disturb: Hotel Horrors: Saints & Sinners
programme.desc: A man has a tryst inside a New Orleans hotel and pays for it with his life. Police discover the victim had a dark secret and with no leads detectives must scour New Orleans' underbelly to find the killer.

programme.title: Do Not Disturb: Hotel Horrors: Hell at Heathrow
programme.desc: Amidst London's worst riots in a generation, two hotel employees are discovered murdered inside a flat near Heathrow Airport. Ultimately, the story has a twist so shocking that trained investigators never see it coming.

programme.title: American Monster: The Green Monster
programme.desc: In rural Ohio, an intruder brutally guns down Jack and Linda Myers in their sleep. The only witness is their sleepy 4-year-old grandson. But their extensive home movies - aired here for the first time - may have captured a monster lurking in their midst.

programme.title: American Monster: Momma's Girl

programme.title: American Monster: The Craigslist Killer
programme.desc: Family and faith have always been important to Richard Beasley, as these home videos show. Which is why it's so scary when one day - the Ohio man vanishes. Especially after police discover that an online monster has been luring local men to their deaths.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: American Monster: A Mother's Work
programme.desc: Never-before-seen home movies reveal the fabulous lifestyle of Lanny and Donna Horwitz raising their only son Radley in their Florida mansion. But when their lives are upended by a ghastly shooting, everyone in this eccentric family becomes a suspect.

programme.title: American Monster: Alabama Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When a man is struck down by a mysterious sickness, the entire town grieves but when his daughter also falls ill, the family becomes suspicious.

programme.title: See No Evil: Dead on Reflection
programme.desc: On April 4th, 2014, Kimberly Robertson's battered body is found on a sidewalk after a date with her boyfriend. A network of surveillance cameras plays out Kimberly's last few hours alive. Can CCTV footage help catch her killer?

programme.title: See No Evil: The Vanishing Babysitter
programme.desc: 15-year-old Elizabeth Ennen was last seen when a friend dropped her off at home. Her distraught mother Virginia says she never walked through the door. Police are baffled until they uncover a piece of CCTV that turns the case in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Sing Karaoke
programme.desc: Joe Crouch wakes up one morning, and after 40 years of marriage, shoots his wife while she sleeps. He flees to Florida and embraces his fugitive life. He funds his hobbies by robbing banks. It is his love of karaoke that gets him caught.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Lot of Pot
programme.desc: Moving small amounts of pot from Mexico lead to a bustling operation for Steve Lamb. By age 20, Lamb was part of a group of traffickers who made millions. Eluding the police, Lamb moved bails of marijuana across the sea until caught in a sting operation.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Dumped
programme.desc: The main suspect in the murder of a pregnant ex-girlfriend, and wanted for the shooting of a current one, Michael Alfonso is a jealous boyfriend who time and again turns to violence. It is Alfonso's criminal lifestyle that gets him caught.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got That Tough Girl Look
programme.desc: Juanita Liebman and two friends plan to rob a man at Biketoberfest in FL, but it goes wrong and the three kick him into a coma. Juanita tries to lay low, but her epilepsy requires medical attention. The cops stake out the pharmacy to apprehend her.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Remarried
programme.desc: After an argument one morning, Michael McGuffey shot his wife point blank in the head. With support from his mother, Michael flees Mexico where he remarries and has a child. The FBI is able to trace Michael by his bank records and bring him into custody.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Dumped

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies

programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cliffside Dreams
programme.desc: A couple with a crew of rambunctious kids and a dream house in San Antonio is in desperate need of a pool. The kings design an expansive pool with a Baja shelf, swim-up bar, giant infinity edge and massive two-storey deck to enjoy the view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Ranch Pool Resort
programme.desc: Three generations living together on a family ranch in Austin, Texas, are ready to upgrade their old, outdated pool with a large sun shelf, a spa and a waterfall with jumping rocks.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Lake Resort Pool
programme.desc: An active family in southern California wants an extravagant pool to remind them of their favorite lakeside vacations. The kings don't know which is bigger, their clients' wish list or the 20-foot jumping cliff they have to create from scratch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cancun in Every Corner
programme.desc: The kings pull out all the stops to maximize an Orange County family's backyard. The shady and dated space is transformed into a three-tiered vacation paradise the family can enjoy at home.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Stakes Are High
programme.desc: A young family recently relocated to College Grove, TN and they desperately miss having a pool to enjoy. With a major elevation issue in their new backyard, Kyle and his team have a challenging build to tackle.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Southern Oasis Pool
programme.desc: A family wants to turn their flat Houston, Texas, yard into a southern oasis. Unpredictable weather, tricky soil conditions and some new material leaves Paul and Brian figuring out how to blow the family's expectations out of the water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lake View Paradise
programme.desc: A couple wants to build their daughter a backyard oasis that also accentuates their beautiful lake views.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Custom Contemporary
programme.desc: Matt and Jen want to tear out their old deck and rebuild their backyard to match the hill country modern vibe they love and give them a place to enjoy quality family time.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Bling by the Bay
programme.desc: A Florida family recruits the kings to design a sleek, modern pool for their oceanfront home on Tampa Bay. The crew creates an over-the-top pool with a vanishing edge spa and a roman soaking tub that's adorned with LED lighting and fire bowls.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hawaiian Paradise Pool
programme.desc: Hawaii may be 3,000 miles away, but the kings are able to recreate the island paradise right outside this family's door. They turn the Ritters' old yard into a luxurious lagoon and give them a dreamy spot to make lots of new memories.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaii Dome House
programme.desc: A mother-and-son team pulls up stakes from the crowded confines of Orange County to build an off-grid family commune outside Keaau, Hawaii. With the help of a skilled aircrete instructor, the duo overcomes a learning curve to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Professional treehouse builder Michael 'Murph' Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington. He enlists his friends to create a natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Carolina Catamaran
programme.desc: A couple of pro builders construct an upcycled off-grid homestead deep in the sprawling South Carolina islands. Plans for the catamaran-style home include a luxury yacht aesthetic, but the couple must build during hurricane season to meet their deadline.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Flathead Lake Pontoon
programme.desc: A Montana carpenter has big plans to build a unique pontoon houseboat so he can live on Flathead Lake year-round. As both a builder and artist, he has the skills to turn his vision into a reality but an early winter threatens the whole project.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcakes 'r' Us
programme.desc: Four imaginative bakers are going to have to unleash their inner child as they compete for the chance to serve their creations at a black tie awards gala for the Chicago Toy and Game Fair.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: The Harlem Globetrotters
programme.desc: Four cupcake makers are going to have to pull out all their baking tricks if they want to win the chance to have their cupcakes center court at a huge fan event for the world famous Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.title: Best Baker in America: Royal Cakes
programme.desc: Host Scott Conant announces a royal baking theme and challenges the competitors to create perfect mini princess cakes.

programme.title: Best Baker in America: Surprise Desserts
programme.desc: Eight bakers remain, and in a week dedicated to surprises, this week’s skills challenge is all about mastery of molten lava cakes.

programme.title: Best Baker in America: Summer Vacation Desserts
programme.desc: With seven bakers remaining, their next mini challenge finds them crafting floating island desserts. The master challenge challenges the bakers to create flaming bombe Alaska with mango as a flavour featured. Chocolatier Valerie Gordon is a guest judge.

programme.title: Best Baker in America: Classic French Pastries Reinvented
programme.desc: Host Scott Conant challenges the six bakers left in the competition to recreate a beloved French classic, the eclair. For the Master Challenge, the competitors have to reimagine a classic French entremet cake using almond as the featured flavor.

programme.title: Challenge: The Wizard of Oz Cakes
programme.desc: Ian Ziering welcomes four cake artists to the kitchen as "Challenge" celebrates the 80th anniversary of "The Wizard of Oz." Winning this competition takes courage, brains and a lot of heart, and although four start the journey, only three will continue.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Local Legends
programme.desc: Alfonso takes you on a tour of local legends, from Tennessee's iconic Jack Daniel's Whiskey to the Fannie May factory in Ohio where sweet Buckeyes are made. He also finds out how a novel mix of hard candy and gum became the Charms Blow Pop.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Layers Of Flavors
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores layer after layer of flavor when he gets the inside scoop on Tootsie's Caramel Apple Pops, Bissinger's Coconut Caramel Chocolate Bar and Tastykake's Cherry Sweet Rolls.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: It's A Rainbow
programme.desc: It's a kaleidoscope of color as Alfonso Ribeiro finds out how RW Garcia make their tortilla chips so vibrantly red. Then it's off to Amy's Kitchen for their multicolored, palate-pleasing Thai Red Curry Bowl.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Freaky Flavors
programme.desc: Alfonso highlights snacks with some freaky flavors! From Upton's Naturals Bacon Seitan to the Smoked Nib Brittle from Olive and Sinclair, to Trolli Sour Brite Crawlers, these curious treats are good eats.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Little Bits
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores little treats with big flavor like the colorful Carousel gumballs at Ford Gum, Ghirardelli Chocolate's decadent semi-sweet Baking Chips and the tasty Duchess Gem Donuts from Carolina Foods.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Quick Fix
programme.desc: Alfonso comes to the rescue with quick fixes. P.F. Chang's Home Menu Beef and Broccoli frozen entree makes weeknight meals easy and Chocolate Chip Quaker Chewy Bars are a great snack for kids and adults both.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Steak
programme.desc: In the culinary world of signature meals, nothing else compares to the sensory experience of steak.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Pork
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels the country to discover the top fifteen greatest pork dishes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Swine Dining
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the Liberty Kitchen in Houston, Texas, where Chef Lance Fegen has built a monster wood-fired Argentinian grill. Roger and Lance prepare a traditional Balinese pig roast by spit-roasting it over bold mesquite coals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Generations Of Smoke
programme.desc: Barbecue is in the blood at two family-run institutions where the dedication for perfecting smoked meats spans decades.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Out Of This World Bbq
programme.desc: Roger meets a pit master with a PhD who cooks Carolina-style whole hog barbecue in Louisiana. Dr. Howard Conyers is an engineer for NASA by day, but a pit master at night.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fueling The Fires In Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking's quest for lip-smacking smoked meat leads him back to the Lone Star State. In Houston, Texas, Grant Pinkerton is an award-winning pit master who recently opened up his first restaurant.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Roger Mooking follows the smoke signals to two Texas restaurants. At Bin Tapas Bar in San Antonio, Texas, Roger and Chef Jason Dady cook a giant pan of paella flavored with Thai ingredients and cooked over a wood burning fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Monster Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to Hoodoo Brown Barbeque in Ridgefield, CT, where owner Cody Sperry serves up monster-sized meaty masterpieces. Cody serves up "outlaw barbeque," a mashup of styles and traditions with smoke pork butts, pork ribs, pork belly and beef.

programme.title: Good Eats: Egg Files VII: Meringue
programme.desc: Alton prepares three meringue-based desserts.

programme.title: Good Eats: Use Your Noodle 4: Lasagna
programme.desc: Learn how to make lasagna, the number one comfort food.

programme.title: Good Eats: Rich Little Poor Boy
programme.desc: One of America's most storied sandwiches gets a historic rethink and a technical do-over, from the oysters to the bread and everything in between. Alton Brown also makes an argument for shucking.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics IV: Spaghetti
programme.desc: Alton explores spaghetti with meat sauce as an American classic and its origins.

programme.desc: After Bob builds a doghouse for Keia, the pugs encourage her to host a puppy housewarming party. Rolly loses his first puppy tooth and can't wait for a visit from the Fang Fairy!

programme.title: Disney Junior Ready for Preschool: Let's Make a Bow
programme.desc: Disney music shorts to help children prepare for preschool.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Mystery of the Secret Gift-Giver/ Mystery at the Cooking Contest
programme.desc: When townspeople start receiving anonymous gifts, Mira searches for the secret gift-giver. Then, Pinky's dishes for the Queen's cooking contest seem to be sabotaged.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Nursery Schooling / Bunny Bunanza
programme.desc: After K.C. gets sick, Pip and Freddy watch the babies in the Nursery for her. Then, when delivery batches of bunnies get mixed up, the Junior Fliers must figure out which bunny is which.

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the garden; Bingo searches for ingredients for a salad; Bluey dreams about a fruit bat.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob and Ana's Bubble Bummer/ Seen Any Seashells?
programme.desc: The Playcare float breaks down before the People and Pets Parade! The Pugs and Keia head out on an ocean-bound mission to find the perfect seashell for Ana!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Double Doggie Dare!/ Empire State of Mind
programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar
programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Flight of the Ninja / Romeo Coaster
programme.desc: Romeo creates a live video game and the PJ Masks must work with the other villains to stop him. After getting separated, Catboy must face his mistakes alone to defeat Night Ninja.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Meet Armadylan / Invisible Owlette
programme.desc: The PJ Masks meet Armadylan and think he is a superhero like them. Owlette is accidentally turned invisible!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Big Surprise/ Meet the Beagles
programme.desc: Goofy struggles to keep Minnie's surprise for Mickey's birthday a secret. The Happy Helpers are asked to help a band get back together.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Fun-tastical Field Day/ Clarabelle on the Mooo-ve!
programme.desc: During Fun-tastical Field Day, Donald tries to do all the competitions himself. The girls reunite for a race so that Clarabelle can try to become a Roadsterette!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Duck, Duck, Dog / Mr. Bob Goes to Washington
programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library!/ARF's Birthday
programme.desc: When Bob discovers he lost a library book, the Pugs race out on a mission to get it before it’s due. The Pugs go on a last minute mission for party supplies for ARF’s birthday.

programme.title: Vampirina: Countess Vee/ Frights Camera Action
programme.desc: Vampirina learns she's been named the heir of Uncle Dieter's castle, making her a Countess! Vee, Poppy and Bridget help Edgar make a monster movie for the school film festival.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Gekko Floats/ Catboy's Two Wheeled Wonder
programme.desc: Romeo uses his newest device to make the PJ Masks and their HQ float away. When Romeo steals the PJ Masks’ super vehicles, they have to use their bicycles to stop him.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's New Doghouse / The Fang Fairy
programme.desc: After Bob builds a doghouse for Keia, the pugs encourage her to host a puppy housewarming party. Rolly loses his first puppy tooth and can't wait for a visit from the Fang Fairy!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Pony Tale
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake's new Fritzer-Spritzer Spray Potion is accidentally sprayed on Daisy's ponytail, making it grow super long.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Brand New Clubhouse
programme.desc: When Donald complains everyone is in his way, Mickey and pals help him build his own clubhouse.

programme.desc: Bluey thinks there are Fairies in the backyard; Bluey and Bingo are hired by Dad at the drainpipe factory; Dad and Bluey send Bingo a video.

programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey want to play a game during a shopping trip; Bluey runs away, leaving Bingo all alone; The kids and Dad go on an outing to the creek.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Donald's Garage/ Artful Helpers
programme.desc: While Mickey is away, Donald is left in charge and tries to improve the garage. The Happy Helpers are asked to guard a valuable painting at the Hot Dog Hills' Fancy Art Museum.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Meet the Beagles!
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Coconutty Monkey

programme.desc: Mickey convinces his friends to search for a treasure because he believes there is one.

programme.desc: Donald volunteers to help a group of ducks get to a warm beach for their winter retreat.

programme.desc: When a mysterious rash of blue spots breaks out among some of the toys in the clinic, Doc traces the 'mystery pox' back to Donny's toy monster, Glo-Bo, who had been finger-painting earlier in the day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Go-long Retriever/ Pot O' Pugs

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Sir Goofs-a-lot
programme.desc: Goofy sets out on a quest to retrieve three items in order to be knighted the bravest.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy-Bo-Peep
programme.desc: Daisy-Bo-Peep loses her 10 sheep and enlists Mickey and the gang to help find them.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald the Frog Prince
programme.desc: Donald gets turned into a frog when he drinks Professor Von Drake's new potion.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey and the Enchanted Egg
programme.desc: Mickey finds an egg, which soon hatches a baby dragon.

programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.desc: Mira goes undercover to find the precious gem of Jalpur. Then, when a dress that Priya made for a fashion show goes missing, Mira discovers that it's hiding in plain sight.

programme.desc: When Skeeter volunteers to help Miss Nanny bake, her twin, Scooter, isn't sure he can have fun playing without her. Then, Skeeter is excited to save the day with Super Fabulous and Captain Ice Cube, but doesn't think she can be a superhero with glasses.

programme.desc: Every parent falls for Vicky's ad campaign; Yugopotamia is conquered by an alien race.

programme.desc: Timmy wishes his life could be like an action movie, and that he could know everything.

programme.title: DuckTales: Sky Pirates...In the Sky!
programme.desc: Tired of being ignored by his family, Dewey’s search for attention goes too far when he falls in with flamboyant Don Karnage and his cutthroat gang of Singing Sky Pirates.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Secret(s) of Castle McDuck!
programme.desc: On a family trip to Scrooge's ancestral castle, Dewey tries to hide the truth about his mom as his brothers search for family secrets.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Depths of Cousin Fethry!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Ballad of Duke Baloney!
programme.desc: Louie and Webby investigate a friendly dockside fisherman who may or may not be Flintheart Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: DuckTales: Last Christmas!
programme.desc: Scrooge celebrates Christmas with his time-traveling ghost buddies while time-lost Dewey teams with Young Donald to find his mom on Christmas.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: DuckTales: Treasure of the Found Lamp!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: In the Old West, Scrooge and Goldie form a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Wrong Gun
programme.desc: In Texas, a 17-year-old with a violent past is named the killer in a drug deal gone wrong - but a misidentified bullet could unravel the case.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.desc: In Texas, a 17-year-old with a violent past is named the killer in a drug deal gone wrong - but a misidentified bullet could unravel the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Golf
programme.desc: Golf.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Locomotive Builder
programme.desc: Mike heads to MotivePower in Boise, Idaho to build and restore locomotives for his 200th dirty job.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wetland Warrior
programme.desc: Mike travels to Texas to work as a stand-in fugitive while attempting to outsmart a team of bloodhounds and evade being captured. Then he heads to the Florida Everglades to help combat non-native, invasive species in the marshlands.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rum Distiller
programme.desc: Mike heads to Newport Distillery to help the crew turn molasses into rum. Scouring copper, working with scalding liquid, hauling hoses and lugging molasses cubes are all just part of a hard day's work.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Termite Researcher
programme.desc: Mike visits with long-time fans Marilyn and Carolyn Maedel to look at never-before-seen footage at a crawfish factory in Louisiana. Then, he experiences the many hands-on duties that come with being a termite researcher on Sapolo Island in Georgia.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Vellum Maker
programme.desc: Mike travels to Yakima, Washington to harvest hops, the main ingredient in beer. From there Mike goes to the Hudson Valley where he turns animal hides in to paper.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Gourd Maker
programme.desc: Mike travels to the middle of Connecticut to clean out a lake, and then drops by a gourd farm in Pennsylvania and transforms gourds into a variety of products.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Exotic Nanny
programme.desc: Mike travels to Texas to help out at a ranch that harbours and breeds different exotic animal species including lemurs, sloths, bearcats and camels.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Lightning Rod Installer
programme.desc: Mike travels to Lucedale, Mississippi to try his hand at installing a lightning rod system on a home.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sea Lamprey Exterminator
programme.desc: In Michigan, Mike helps the U.S. Department of Fish & Wildlife control the sea lamprey population that is jeopardizing the fishing industry of the Great Lakes. Then at Mandalay Bay Casino Mike makes 'meat gel' to feed the fish in the shark reef aquarium.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Blueberry Connoisseur
programme.desc: Mike creates an 'interesting' flavour at the Jelly Belly Candy Company.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Greenland Shark Quest
programme.desc: Mike Rowe heads to Greenland to learn about one of the more obscure sharks.

programme.title: Smalltown Throwdown: The Most Boring and The Drunkest
programme.desc: In a quest to redeem towns with notorious reputations, comedian host Mo Mandel travels to the 'Most Boring town' and 'Drunkest town' in America to see if they actually deserve their infamous monikers.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: Ninety thousand tons of ammunition explodes; two cranes fall fifty stories in Taiwan.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: Pow Stick!
programme.desc: Jimmy makes a change to the pow stick.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Peacock Bass on the Amazon
programme.desc: We fish for peacock bass on the Amazon River.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Islamorada, FL Keys, Dolphin by the book!
programme.desc: George Poveromo teams up with Jake Roth from Post Card Inn.

programme.title: Local Knowledge: Castaways Part II
programme.desc: Rush and Ali team up with Ben Wilson to target dogtooth tuna as their Fiji adventure continues at the island of Namotu.

programme.title: Into the Blue: Tuna Time
programme.desc: Scott and Steve search for big tuna.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience: Offshore of Hawks Cay
programme.desc: Captains Tom and Rich are joined by two key figures in the success of Hawks Cay.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: Snookin' Around Jupiter
programme.desc: Rick is guided by Capt. Craig Korcyznski as he fishes Jupiter Inlet for snook.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: A survival instructor and retiree of the armed forces are inserted into the volcano-ravaged island of Montserrat. With completely different survival styles, they find a way to work together, but one accident single-handedly has an eruptive effect on both.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Stomping Grounds
programme.desc: Elite survivalists Matt Wright and Gary Golding are tested by deadly spitting cobras and territorial elephants in an African killing zone. But Matt and Gary aren't alone each must protect a novice survivalist from the threats surrounding them.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Shaken and Very Stirred
programme.desc: A powerful earthquake in the Philippine jungle rattles a thrill-seeking chef and a competitive hockey mom but lack of food and severe dehydration lead to a disastrous face-first fall. Later, two superfans are dropped deep in the Amazon rainforest.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Close Encounters
programme.desc: Two strangers are dropped in one of the most dangerous African locations in the dead heat of Summer. Faced with aggressive hippos and charging elephants they quickly learn their place, but must mark their territory if they want to make it twenty-one days.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Baked Alaskan
programme.desc: A deadly spider bite puts Gwen, an Alaskan homesteader at risk of tapping but she works with her partner to get her revenge, in the 130-degree heat of the Mexican jungle.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Countdown to XL: Second Time's the Charm
programme.desc: Former survivalists re-visit their pioneering 21-day challenge in Ecuador as a threesome. They ventured into the jungle, facing jaguars along the way, as well as a two-on-one dynamic. Now, they must prepare for a 40-day challenge in Africa.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Countdown to XL: Only in Brazil
programme.desc: A wilderness educator and IT business owner reflect on their 21-day challenge in the Brazilian wild, including a heart-stopping encounter with a jaguar. Their experiences have prepared them well for their upcoming 40-day challenge in Africa.

programme.title: sMothered: Our Own Little World
programme.desc: Sandra highjacks her daughter's 21st birthday. Sunhe wedges herself further between Angelica and Jason. Cristina and Kathy upset Carly at Carlo's birthday party.

programme.title: sMothered: Three's Company
programme.desc: Kathy and Christina break Carly's trust. Sandra and Mariah repair their relationship, and make plans to go on a double date. Then, Dawn attends Cher and Jared's sonogram and takes over the appointment.

programme.title: sMothered: Make Room For Mom
programme.desc: Sandra and Mariah go on a double-date. Angelica takes a break from her boyfriend and goes away with her mom. Cristina takes Kathy for a breast implant consultation. Dawn spends her birthday weekend helping Cher move and making room for the baby.

programme.title: sMothered: Time to Intervene
programme.desc: Sunhe joins Angelica to break things off with Jason. Jared is upset when Dawn surprises Cher with a lamaze class. Kathy undermines Cristina's husband's plans for a communion party.

programme.title: sMothered: Pushing Boundaries
programme.desc: A proposal comes between Angelica and her mother. Mariah sees how far she can push things during a sexy photoshoot with her mom. Cher's mom feels left out of planning her gender reveal party. Cristina and her mom face her in-laws at her son's communion.

programme.title: sMothered: Cutting the Cord
programme.desc: Kathy and Cristina deal with the fallout from the communion party. Angelica goes behind her mother's back for love. Dawn learns that she isn't the first one to know the gender of Cher's baby. Mariah and Sandra face backlash after their sexy photoshoot.

programme.title: Shark Tank

programme.title: Shark Tank

programme.desc: Lucy and Haiku compete to be the new president of the Young Mortician's Club at school. Leni worries about her friendship with Miguel and Fiona when she's promoted to temporary manager at work.

programme.desc: Lynn finds an unexpected TV sports watching buddy in the family's next-door neighbor, Mr. Grouse. When Lisa realizes that Pop Pop won't be around forever, she turns to science to ensure his longevity.

programme.title: The Loud House: Sister Act/ House Flip

programme.title: The Loud House: Feast or Family/ A Dark and Story Night

programme.title: The Loud House and Casagrandes Hangin' at Home

programme.desc: Plankton hires Patrick to create advertising slogans for the Chum Bucket. SpongeBob helps Plankton find the perfect anniversary gift for Karen.

programme.title: Hoarders: Gail and Warren
programme.desc: Gail's house is literally falling in around her but the house is too full of stuff to repair. A self-employed heating and refrigeration specialist brings his work clutter home with him.

programme.title: Hoarders: Andrew/ Shania
programme.desc: Andrew's home is an eyesore in a neighbourhood of million dollar homes. 14-year-old Shania has three rooms filled with broken toys and old clothes that she refuses to get rid of.

programme.title: Hoarders: Mary and Mary Ann
programme.desc: Mary has overstuffed her home and consignment shop, spending over $200,000; Mary Ann's husband threatens divorce.

programme.title: Hoarders: Diana/ Dolores
programme.desc: Diana's hoarding became so extreme that her daughter was forced to sleep in a recliner because the trash had overtaken her room. Dolores' hoard could catch on fire and burn her house down at any time.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ellen and Gloria
programme.desc: The tragic loss of Ellen's husband in the line of duty triggered hoarding through kleptomania. Gloria's family is on the verge of calling the sheriff.

programme.title: Hoarders: Adella/ Teri
programme.desc: Adella's children try one last time to help their mother fight her hoarding. Teri's hoarding caused her doctor to call Child Protective Services to help her children.

programme.title: Hoarders: Arline/ Carolyn
programme.desc: Arline's hoard has reached such immense proportions that her husband has been sleeping in his car each night to recover from surgery. Carolyn's family will press charges if she doesn't return stolen items.

programme.title: The First 48: Deadly Ride/ Wrong Place, Wrong Time
programme.desc: When a Cleveland man is shot while driving his car, detectives search four states to find his killer. In Miami, a man is gunned down, but detectives have to rely on tight-lipped citizens to solve the murder.

programme.title: The First 48: Night Shift/ Mobbed
programme.desc: Deputy Dennis Wolfford responds to the murder of a 20-year-old convenience store clerk, killed by a gunman wearing a mask and gloves.

programme.title: The First 48: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: In Rochester, a man from a neighboring suburb is found shot to death on a city street.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: What Matters Most
programme.desc: Mary attempts to diversify into other types of tird products, and is invited to present as part of Career Day at Katie's high school.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Movie: I Now Pronounce You Chuck and Larry
programme.desc: A firefighter agrees to enter a same-sex marriage with one of his colleagues so he can name his children as his life insurance beneficiaries. The media soon turn the blessed event into headline news.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Lucy Wants a Friend
programme.desc: Lucy convinces Chief McConky to transfer Delilah Dunn to the station, which causes the men in the team to seek a macho match to their energy. Meanwhile, Eddie takes Councilwoman Price for a walk on the wild side.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Chris Webber vs. Bo the Fan
programme.desc: Broadcasting legend Rich Eisen shows one fan there's no such thing as a free lunch, an interactive video game gets a little too realistic, and Chris Webber teams up with former teammate Lou Williams to get things popping.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Connor Fields vs. Taina the Fan
programme.desc: Josh Norman goes undercover again to talk about how much he hates Josh Norman, and one fan gets a wild ride with BMX legend Connor Fields.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Tara Lipinski vs. Valeria the Fan
programme.desc: A pair of NASCAR enthusiasts get driven crazy when superstar driver Kyle Larsen surprises them with the ride of a lifetime, and skating legend Tara Lipinski recruits her biggest fan to be a whistle blower.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Candace Parker vs. Delmy the Fan
programme.desc: Wrestling legend Bill Goldberg shows how shooting a commercial is backbreaking work, and football star Travis Kelce is back to test some products. Plus, one fan can't look up to WNBA superstar Candace Parker anymore.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Swimming in Hacks
programme.desc: The amount of times Kevin has tried and failed to hack a swimming pool. The city that has a love affair with bagels.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Dr. Hack to the Rescue
programme.desc: What do Beyonce and Brooke have in common? And was the first sports bra really made from two jock straps?

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Hacks for Work and Play
programme.desc: Was basketball created from a hack? And which explosive hack gave Brooke nightmares?

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Slacker vs. Hacker

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 7
